description: Add task statuses: pending, in progress, done

userStories.title: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'
userStories.description: As developer, add status column to tasks so each task stores a status.
acceptanceCriteria: Database migration adds 'status' column to tasks with default 'pending'
Existing tasks set to 'pending' after migration

userStories.title: Add backend action to update task status
userStories.description: As user, change task status from list; backend persists status change.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes endpoint to update task status
Status updates persist to DB and return updated task

userStories.title: Show status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As user, see badge on each task card showing status.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display status badge with values Pending, In Progress, Done
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As user, change status inline from task row (dropdown or menu).
acceptanceCriteria: Status control present in task row and updates status on selection
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status filter to task list
userStories.description: As user, filter task list by status (All, Pending, In Progress, Done).
acceptanceCriteria: Task list filter persists selection and filters results
Filter options include All, Pending, In Progress, Done
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
